messages.content: 他们中的一些人提供给我们的清单不包括他们是否已经订购了纸箱。我已经要求他们提供他们还没有订购纸箱的PO清单，如果供应商对于他们不能找到POs进行确认，但POs已经被我们免除。这些话怎么翻译成英文

Some of them in their group have provided us with a list that does not include whether they have already placed orders for cardboard boxes. I have already asked them to provide us with their PO list for cardboard boxes that they have not yet ordered. If the suppliers are unable to find POs for confirmation but the POs have already been exempted by us.

Thank you for your understanding. 
You don’t need to do anything if your POs have already exempt, because you can’t not search them in the Nexus system. By the way, could you please share your list of the  PO should be exemption with me?
谢谢您的理解。如果您的PO已经被豁免，您不需要做任何操作，因为您无法在Nexus系统中搜索到它们。顺便问一下，您能否与我分享应该豁免的PO清单？

在您的问题中，没有明显的语法错误。但是，可以进行一些微调来使其更加流畅和准确。以下是修改后的版本：

Thank you for your understanding. If your POs have already been exempted, you do not need to take any further action as they cannot be searched in the Nexus system. By the way, could you please share with me the list of POs that should be exempted?

Can you help track down the attached Pos in Nexus, and confirm for me they are in the system.  I think there is some confusion as to what should be exempt or not from packaging confirmation based on what the factory provided, but first I want to confirm the factory can actually see their Pos in Nexus generally, and can still fill out the pack plan accordingly.

什么意思

您是否可以帮助我在Nexus系统中追踪附加的PO，并确认它们是否存在于系统中。我认为根据工厂提供的信息，对于哪些订单应该被豁免或不豁免包装确认存在一些混淆。但首先，我想确认工厂是否能够在Nexus系统中看到他们的PO，以便可以相应地填写包装计划。

这段对话是在讨论关于在Nexus系统中追踪并验证订单的问题。询问对话对象是否能帮助追踪并确认订单是否存在于Nexus系统中，并了解工厂是否能够看到他们的订单以便填写包装计划。此外，还提到了关于包装确认豁免和非豁免的一些混淆。

I have double check just now. For the PO#4500544688 & PO#4500544561, they are in the exempt list, so you couldn’t find out of them. If the POs in the exempt list, but still have not order the carton, then you need to submit packing image in Infor for our approval. Thank you.
有语法错误吗

根据您的描述，以下是纠正后的版本：

I have just double-checked. The PO#4500544688 & PO#4500544561 are on the exempt list, so you won't be able to find them. If the POs are on the exempt list but you haven't yet placed an order for cartons, then you need to submit packing images in Infor for our approval. Thank you.
我会这么做的，但是我对RG BARRY这个项目还不太熟悉，我需要继续去摸索，你可以给我一点时间吗？这个请求的截止时间是什么呢? 怎么发英文告诉tim呢

我理解您需要时间来熟悉RG BARRY这个项目。您可以告知我截止日期是什么时候吗？这样我可以帮助您确定工作计划。要向Tim发出英文通知，您可以使用以下表达方式：

Subject: Request for Extension - RG BARRY Project

Dear Tim,

I hope this email finds you well. I am reaching out to request for a brief extension on the RG BARRY project. As I am still getting familiar with the project specifics, I would greatly appreciate a little more time to explore and gather the necessary information.

Could you please provide me with the new deadline for this request? This will allow me to properly plan and allocate resources to ensure timely completion.

Thank you for your understanding and support. I look forward to your response.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

I will do that for you. As I am still getting familiar with RG Barry’s specifics, I would greatly appreciate a little more time to explore and gather the necessary information. Could you please give me some time to do that and could you please provide me with the new deadline for this request?

这句话是是意思

I will do that for you. As I am still getting familiar with RG Barry's specifics, I would greatly appreciate a little more time to explore and gather the necessary information. Could you please give me some time to do that? Also, could you please provide me with the new deadline for this request?

I am appreciated to do that for you. But I am still getting familiar with RG Barry’s specifics, I would greatly appreciate a little more time to explore and gather the necessary information. Could you please give me some time to do it and could you please provide me with the new deadline for this request? 有语法错误吗？优化一下

I appreciate the opportunity to assist you. However, as I am still in the process of familiarizing myself with the specifics of RG Barry, I would greatly appreciate a bit more time to thoroughly explore and gather the necessary information. Could you please allow me some additional time to accomplish this task? Additionally, I kindly request that you provide me with the new deadline for this request.

I will do that for you. But I am still getting familiar with RG Barry’s specifics, I would greatly appreciate a little more time to explore and gather the necessary information. Could you please give me some time to accomplish this task and could you please provide me with the new deadline for this request? Thank you so much. 优化一下

I will gladly do that for you. However, as I am currently acquainting myself with the specific details of RG Barry, I kindly request a little more time to thoroughly explore and gather the necessary information. Would it be possible for you to grant me some additional time to complete this task? Additionally, I would greatly appreciate it if you could provide me with the new deadline for this request. Thank you sincerely for your understanding and assistance.
